name: golang-github-zeebo-xxh3-dev
title: golang-github-zeebo-xxh3-dev
description:
XXH3 algorithm in Go
This package is a port of the xxh3 (Extremely fast hash algorithm)
library to Go.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-zeebo-xxh3-dev because XXH3 algorithm in Go.

When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-zeebo-xxh3-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-zeebo-xxh3-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
